title: Login support for credential stores/helper
body:
Docker supports [credential stores](https://docs.docker.com/engine/reference/commandline/login/), podman does not.

I see this being mentioned in https://github.com/containers/podman/issues/4119#issuecomment-535660495 e.g., but it does not seem to be very successful. (and AFAIK that issue there is about the CLI of

comments.body:
Ah forget it, I guess this is a duplicate of https://github.com/containers/podman/issues/4119

The title there is just not really obvious to me, as it does not mention the credential store.
